form.title: Analyze a Facebook page
form.subtitle: Collect reel URLs via the console script, then analyze them here.
form.scriptHint: This script is read-only. Use Copy to paste in Facebook console.

usage.title: How to use this app
usage.step1: Open Facebook and log in to your account.
usage.step2: Go to the page that has reels/videos and scroll to load more.
usage.step3: Open DevTools → Console and paste the script above.
usage.step4: Copy the JSON output from the console.
usage.step5: Paste the URLs into the textbox, then click Analyze.
usage.step6: Select items and start the download.

results.title: Detected videos
results.description: Run an analysis to list videos, duration, and source links before downloading.
results.empty: Paste URLs and run analysis to see videos here.

progress.title: Download progress
progress.description: Downloads will stream here with real-time percentages once started.
progress.empty: Start a download to track progress here.

help.title: How to export cookies.txt
help.step1: Install a cookies.txt exporter extension (Get cookies.txt locally or cookies.txt).
help.step2: Log in to Facebook in your browser.
help.step3: Export cookies for facebook.com as cookies.txt.
help.step4: Paste the full cookies.txt content into the field above.
